content: A person claiming to be from Mumbai Cyber Police called me and said a parcel with my name contains illegal drugs. They demanded a video call on Skype to record my statement.
My internet banking password is not working. Can you please help me reset it? I need to pay my electricity bill.
Dear Customer, your HDFC bank account is suspended due to missing KYC. Click here to update your PAN immediately: http://bit.ly/hdfc-kyc-update
